# Write-JobLog

## Description

iRequest / BMC ISAPI form entry point. Wraps Run-IRequest using posted form data. Equates to: Start-AutomationOrchestrator -RequestType 'irequest' -FormData $FormData

## Original Comment-Based Help
```powershell
.SYNOPSIS
        iRequest / BMC ISAPI form entry point.
        Wraps Run-IRequest using posted form data.
        Equates to: Start-AutomationOrchestrator -RequestType 'irequest' -FormData $FormData
```
